subject: Quick automation wins for Casey Law
body:
Hi,

I came across Casey Law TX and noticed you run a focused practice in Austin. Smaller firms often get the most value from automation because every hour saved goes directly to billable work.

We help law firms automate repetitive tasks like intake forms, appointment scheduling, client status updates, and document requests. Most firms save 8-12 hours per week.

Would a quick 10-minute call this week make sense?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
